name: Neon Dark
description: High-contrast dark theme with electric neon accents. For agent dashboards, cyber UIs, and spatial interfaces.

decorators.neon-card: Dark card with neon cyan border glow, 1px solid border, and box-shadow using primary at 30% opacity.
decorators.neon-badge: Compact pill badge with neon fill color, dark text, and subtle glow shadow matching the badge color.
decorators.neon-input: Dark input with thin neon border, glowing focus ring in primary cyan, dark surface background.
decorators.neon-grid-line: Subtle grid pattern overlay at 5% opacity using thin lines for cyberpunk dashboard aesthetic.
